prompt: Soft golden bokeh circles filling the background from warm string lights at dusk, with a shallow-depth-of-field romantic composition. In the foreground, a few sharp autumn maple leaves in orange and gold rest on a slightly wet wooden surface. Warm amber tones dominate, with a faint cool lavender dusk haze in the distance. Gentle nostalgic glow, polished K-drama romance mood, soft lens bloom, everything creamy and luminous except the leaves. 16:9, photorealistic.

settings.depth_of_field: controlled depth of field for thumbnail readability
